title: Flask: request
description: Completion of an HTTP request handled by a Flask route. Emitted by FlaskHoneybadger on the request_finished signal.

blueprint.description: Flask blueprint name, if the route belongs to one.

params.description: Query and form params. Only present when include_params is enabled in insights_config.

request_id.description: Request ID from X-Request-ID header or a generated UUID. Set in event context at request start.
